professional_summary_base: Senior Cloud Infrastructure professional with 16 years of overall IT experience including 6+ years specializing in Microsoft Azure. Strong expertise in Azure architecture, hybrid cloud, high availability, disaster recovery, governance, monitoring, and cost optimization. Experienced designing and stabilizing enterprise-scale and regulated Azure environments across healthcare and SaaS domains.

bullets: Support Microsoft-aligned enterprise customers with Azure cloud reliability, resiliency, and disaster recovery initiatives.
Conduct Azure HA/DR and resiliency assessments across compute, networking, identity, monitoring, and recovery layers.
Design and validate High Availability and Disaster Recovery architectures using Azure Availability Zones, Azure Backup, and Azure Site Recovery.
Review Azure Landing Zone configurations for governance and operational readiness.
Assess and improve Major Incident Response Plans aligned with SLA and recovery objectives.
Evaluate business continuity and failover readiness across infrastructure components.
Translate technical findings into actionable recommendations for engineering teams and leadership.
Led Azure cloud infrastructure operations across development, staging, and production environments.
Managed and mentored a 5-member cloud engineering team.
Implemented Azure Monitor and Grafana observability reducing MTTR by 40%.
Defined incident response and change management processes.
Drove Azure cost governance through tagging, budgets, and optimization initiatives.
Designed and supported secure Azure infrastructure environments for enterprise workloads.
Implemented Azure virtual networks, subnet segmentation, NSGs, and routing configurations.
Managed Azure VM provisioning, lifecycle management, and performance optimization.
Designed Azure Backup policies and conducted recovery testing.
Collaborated with security teams on firewall policies and access control configurations.
Delivered Azure infrastructure support, monitoring, and performance tuning for enterprise environments.
Supported hybrid migration planning and subscription optimization initiatives.
Led onboarding and enablement sessions for new cloud engineers.
Led hybrid Azure migrations across compute, storage, and networking.
Designed enterprise Azure Landing Zones with governance and subscription structure.
Implemented Azure Policy, Security Center, RBAC, and MFA.
Designed disaster recovery architecture using Azure Site Recovery.
Delivered ~20% Azure cost savings through governance and optimization.
Designed healthcare-compliant Azure environments.
Implemented disaster recovery and backup automation.
Reduced on-prem downtime by 50% through phased hybrid migration.
Managed enterprise IT infrastructure operations.
Implemented disaster recovery planning and backup strategies.
Administered Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, and Windows Server environments.
Managed server deployments and enterprise IT support.
Implemented patch management and endpoint security.
Delivered onsite and remote technical support.
Handled system deployment and troubleshooting.

certifications: Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert (AZ-305)
